martha.name: Martha
martha.comment: Martha, looks like a great evening for a cycle, around 18-20°C and hardly any wind, so maybe drag Britt along for a ride around 6-8 pm. The wind is only about 6 km/h, making it a perfect time to get out. You've earned a cold one after, so pack that in too.

britt.name: Britt
britt.comment: Britt, looks like cycling is the way to go today, especially between 18:00–20:00 when it's a pleasant 22°C with calm winds. If Martha's free, drag her along for a ride and then grab a drink on the terrace afterwards. Not the best day for running due to the warm temperatures, but cycling should be a breeze.
